name: Amber Roast House
shortDescription: Warm neighborhood cafe focused on pour-over and seasonal beans.
directions: Across from Melati Park, next to the bookstore.

name: Kopi Halaman
shortDescription: Garden-style coffee spot with all-day brunch and espresso drinks.
directions: Enter Cendana lane and follow signs to the back courtyard.
otherInfo: Live acoustic set every Friday evening.

name: North Bean Studio
shortDescription: Modern specialty cafe with a rotating single-origin menu.
directions: On the second floor of North Point building.
otherInfo: Separate silent corner for working sessions.

name: Senja Kopi Lab
shortDescription: Rooftop coffee lab known for milk-based signature creations.
directions: Use elevator B to level 5 rooftop.

name: Ruang Seduh Timur
shortDescription: Cozy late-night cafe highlighting Indonesian local roasters.
directions: Corner unit opposite Gatsu Plaza parking exit.
otherInfo: Board games available at the cashier.
